title: Meet the farmer
lines: As you approach the Old Crow Farm, you spot a lone figure standing by the massive barn doors.
The farmer stands stiffly, clutching a pitchfork, his eyes fixed on something in the distance you can't see.
He looks like he hasn't slept in weeks, and there's a strange, rhythmic ticking coming from somewhere inside the barn.

options.desc: 1. Have seen this, lets go back
2. Talk to him and see what's wrong
3. Hurry away, so you don't catch anything
